SYNTHETIC TEST FIXTURE - not a real course transcript. Planted ASR errors for pipeline tests.

Networking Basics

The art protocol maps an IP address to a mag address on the physical network interface.

A pen connects wearables over bluetooth in a personal area network.

Never run a pen test on the personal area network without written authorization.

Hashing Concepts

The hedging function produces a fixed-length message digest and is one way.

IoT devices sometimes use Wi-Fi city for low power communication.
